indices.name: KOSPI
indices.original_text: The benchmark KOSPI rose 0.06% to close at 5,224 on Friday, extending its rally to reach a fresh record high. Over the past month, the index has climbed 21.23% and is up 107.53% compared to the same time last year.

indices.name: KOSDAQ
indices.original_text: The KOSDAQ index surpassed 1,000 points on Jan. 26, a return to the 1,000 point range after 4 years since January 2021. KOSDAQ closed at 1,064.41, up 70.48 points (7.09%) from the previous session. The KOSDAQ index soared 25.8% this month.

indices.name: Gold (XAU/USD)
indices.original_text: Gold crashed 8% to $4,941 and Gold's price dropped 11%. Gold plunged as much as 8% on Friday, January 30, 2026, testing $4,941. Gold fell more than 12% to slump below $5,000 an ounce in its biggest intraday decline since the early 1980s.

indices.original_text: Silver plunged as much as 36%, a record intraday decline. Silver plunges 30% in worst day since 1980. Spot Silver prices plunged 37% on Friday, January 30, marking their biggest single-day fall on record.

notes: 모든 데이터는 최소 2개 출처에서 교차 검증됨

KOSPI/KOSDAQ 급등은 정부 증시 활성화 정책 기대 및 반도체 실적 호조
비트코인 급락은 레버리지 청산 및 금/은 급락 연쇄 영향
